vocab.meaning: tình đồng đội, sự thân thiết giữa những người cùng nhóm
vocab.example: What I loved most about the football club was the sense of camaraderie that developed during our grueling practice sessions.

vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy/nuôi dưỡng kỹ năng làm việc nhóm
vocab.example: Being part of a volleyball team really helped foster teamwork and taught me how to coordinate with others effectively.

vocab.meaning: lợi thế cạnh tranh/tinh thần quyết tâm chiến thắng
vocab.example: Playing in a local league gave me a real competitive edge and pushed me to constantly improve my skills.

vocab.meaning: năng lực/sự thành thạo trong thể thao
vocab.example: I wouldn't say I possessed much sporting prowess, but I always gave it my all when I was on the court.

vocab.meaning: sự cam kết/tận tâm không lay chuyển
vocab.example: The coach demanded unwavering commitment from everyone, which meant showing up for training rain or shine.
In a team environment, you learn to prioritize shared objectives over individual glory.

vocab.word: resilience in the face of defeat
vocab.meaning: sự kiên cường khi đối mặt với thất bại
vocab.example: Competitive sports taught me resilience in the face of defeat, helping me bounce back stronger after a loss.

vocab.meaning: nỗ lực hết mình để đạt được sự xuất sắc
vocab.example: Being surrounded by talented teammates inspired me to strive for excellence in every match we played.
Playing as a midfielder required a high level of tactical awareness to anticipate the opponent's next move.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác thuộc về một nơi nào đó/sự gắn kết
vocab.example: The sports team provided me with a strong sense of belonging during my high school years.
